nasb.text: I think then that this is good in view of the present distress, that it is good for a man to remain as he is.

esv.text: I think that in view of the present distress it is good for a person to remain as he is.

cnv.text: 為了目前的困難，我認為人最好能保持現狀。

ccb.text: 鉴于目前时势艰难，我认为各人最好是安于现状。

csbs.text: 实际上，由于现今的艰难，我认为一个人保持现状是合宜的，这才是好的。
